NOTIRA-NOTIRA_NEWBIE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]XP[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Cruelty[/gold].
NOTIRA-NOTIRA_NEWBIE.flavor: [red]The details of this relic have been revealed.[/red]
NOTIRA-NOTIRA_NEWBIE.title: Newbie
NOTIRA-NOTIRA_SUPERIOR.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]50[/blue] [gold]XP[/gold] and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Cruelty[/gold].
NOTIRA-NOTIRA_SUPERIOR.flavor: [red]The details of this relic have been revealed.[/red]
NOTIRA-NOTIRA_SUPERIOR.title: Veteran
NOTIRA-SUZAKUIN_TSUBAKI.description: For the first [blue]4[/blue] turns, if the first card you play is an Attack, play it again. Otherwise, gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
NOTIRA-SUZAKUIN_TSUBAKI.flavor: Skilled in iaido counterattacks, but truly excels at dual-wielding.
NOTIRA-SUZAKUIN_TSUBAKI.title: Suzakuin
NOTIRA-MANGEKYOUI.description: For the first [blue]6[/blue] turns, odd turns: gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]; even turns: gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
NOTIRA-MANGEKYOUI.flavor: A curious encounter in a parallel world.
NOTIRA-MANGEKYOUI.title: Kaleidoscope
NOTIRA-KIXUTIAN.description: At the start of combat, apply [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Expose[/gold] to ALL enemies.
NOTIRA-KIXUTIAN.title: Shell Void Heaven
NOTIRA-DAEMON.description: Remove all Strikes and Defends from your deck.
NOTIRA-DAEMON.flavor:
This
is
not
a
hero's
story
NOTIRA-DAEMON.title: Muramasa
NOTIRA-MAHOU.description: Choose a card. Set its cost to [blue]0[/blue] for the rest of combat.
NOTIRA-MAHOU.title: Magic
NOTIRA-HUZIMAO.description: Increase the chance of ? rooms containing treasure chests by [blue]2x[/blue].
NOTIRA-HUZIMAO.title: Whisker Cat Adventure
NOTIRA-SEASON.title: Lies of the Four Seasons
NOTIRA-HOUKAGO_CINDERELLA.description: After your turn ends, automatically play up to [blue]5[/blue] cards.
NOTIRA-HOUKAGO_CINDERELLA.title: After-School Cinderella
NOTIRA-FATA_MORGANANO_YAKATA.description: At the end of your first turn, gain an additional turn.
NOTIRA-FATA_MORGANANO_YAKATA.flavor: A unique art style, an excellent work.
NOTIRA-FATA_MORGANANO_YAKATA.title: The House in Fata Morgana
NOTIRA-SORCERESS.description: At the end of the first turn, deal damage to ALL enemies equal to the damage you dealt this turn.
NOTIRA-SORCERESS.flavor: A bit boring early on, but gets better later.
NOTIRA-SORCERESS.title: World's End Fallen Star
